vocab.meaning: chọn lọc và tổ chức (triển lãm)
vocab.example: The gallery was meticulously curated, with each piece transitioning perfectly into the next to tell a cohesive story.

vocab.meaning: gợi cảm xúc, khơi gợi kỷ niệm
vocab.example: I found the impressionist wing particularly evocative, as the play of light reminded me of my childhood summers.

vocab.meaning: cách diễn giải chủ quan (theo ý hiểu cá nhân)
vocab.example: Abstract art is fascinating because it allows for a subjective interpretation, where every visitor sees something entirely different.

vocab.meaning: cốt truyện bằng hình ảnh/lối kể chuyện qua hình ảnh
vocab.example: The mural was more than just a painting; it was a powerful visual narrative depicting the struggle and resilience of the local community.

vocab.meaning: sự đặt cạnh nhau (để làm nổi bật sự đối lập)
vocab.example: I loved the juxtaposition of classical sculptures against the stark, modern backdrop of the gallery walls.
The spatial arrangement of the installations encouraged visitors to move through the gallery in a very specific, contemplative way.
Visiting a photography exhibit on social justice had a profound impact on my worldview and how I perceive equality.

vocab.meaning: sự thưởng thức/trân trọng vẻ đẹp nghệ thuật
vocab.example: Schools should organize more gallery trips to foster aesthetic appreciation in children from an early age.

vocab.meaning: sự chính trực/nguyên bản trong nghệ thuật
vocab.example: The curator emphasized the importance of maintaining artistic integrity by not over-explaining the pieces to the audience.
Modern art galleries often use digital projections to create an immersive experience that engages all the senses.
